title: localLLM
shortSummary: Self-hosted local AI node for Open WebUI and Ollama with model routing, operator workflows, and deployment guidance.
problem: Local AI tooling often looks promising in demos but falls apart under operator friction, unclear setup, and weak deployment guidance.
contribution: Owned product framing, implementation direction, operator workflow shape, and deployment-oriented structure.
outcomes: Improved operator setup clarity and deployment confidence
Kept model workflow practical without platform sprawl

title: Debt Crusher
shortSummary: Local-first debt payoff workspace with explainable recommendation logic and user-centered planning flows.
problem: Debt tools often overwhelm users with spreadsheets, generic calculators, or opaque recommendations.
contribution: Owned workflow design, recommendation framing, and overall application direction.
outcomes: Delivered clearer recommendation reasoning for users
Improved trust through explicit user control and local-first behavior

title: WealthPilot
shortSummary: Portfolio analysis tool blending deterministic scoring with AI-generated PM-style memos.
problem: Portfolio tools often split into raw dashboards or shallow AI commentary with little structure.
contribution: Owned product framing and blend of deterministic analysis with AI-assisted memo generation.
outcomes: Preserved analytical structure while adding AI-assisted insights
Improved portfolio workflow clarity for decision support

title: Price Pin
shortSummary: Map-first app for nearby product availability, price confidence, and community moderation.
problem: Shoppers needed reliable local inventory and price confidence without fragmented app switching.
contribution: Designed geo-aware product flows and community reporting mechanics.
outcomes: Made confidence signals clearer for nearby buying decisions

title: Kadi Tiri
shortSummary: Multiplayer trick-taking card game with bidding, partner selection, trick play, and server-owned room state.
problem: Real-time multiplayer game logic required deterministic room state and fair turn sequencing.
contribution: Implemented room-state orchestration and interaction flow for bidding and trick play.
outcomes: Improved interaction clarity during live game rounds

title: HA Home
shortSummary: Home Assistant dashboard suite with custom Lovelace cards for room intelligence and energy visibility.
problem: Off-the-shelf dashboards lacked practical visibility and control for household automation workflows.
contribution: Built custom Lovelace cards and dashboard composition for room-level insights.
outcomes: Made energy and room-state signals easier to interpret
